summary: Scanner + WebSocket + Enhanced Watchlist - Complete Testing. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements and flows verified.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic, not blocking functionality

Backend: Each asset has symbol and name fields

Backend: Scan returns asset summary fields (symbol, name, price, change_percent, signal, confidence, rsi, risk_score, regime)
Backend: Scan returns opportunities with type, label, severity, confidence, signal, symbol
Backend: Scan summary has total, high_priority, by_type, by_severity
Backend: GET /api/scanner/opportunities returns latest scan summary
Backend: GET /api/scanner/history returns scan history with timestamps and opportunity counts
Backend: GET /api/ws/status returns active_connections (int)
Backend: GET /api/ws/status returns channels (list)
Backend: POST /api/watchlist/scan returns enriched results with rsi, risk_score, win_probability
Backend: POST /api/watchlist/scan can generate alerts (alerts_generated field)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Scanner features fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_scanner_and_websocket.py. All 4 scanner endpoints working: GET /api/scanner/universe, POST /api/scanner/scan, GET /api/scanner/opportunities, GET /api/scanner/history. WebSocket status at GET /api/ws/status. WebSocket endpoint at /ws/{channel} (not /api/ws/). Enhanced watchlist scan includes quant_alignment alerts. Use max_assets:3 with categories:['crypto'] for fast testing. DB collections: scanner_history, watchlist_alerts.

mocked_components.note: Market data uses real APIs with smart fallback to generated candles when insufficient data
